note: Issue #164 211 runtime-only rollout evidence for the df85a9f runtime subject after PR #187. The live API/worker containers use ai-platform:df85a9f-issue183-contracts-runtime-only-v1 with matching runtime subject, runtime source marker, OCI revision, and hyphen/underscore source-revision labels.
